# Ariama Victor (ovac4u)

> Founder & CEO of Gidipex. Senior software engineer with 17+ years shipping
> production software. Works at the intersection of core AI programming, applied
> business modelling & strategy, and crypto technologies. Remote, worldwide.
> Open-source maintainer of `idoc` (481K+ Composer installs), `guardrails`,
> `laravel-mcp-inspector`, `hubtel-payment`, and `laravel-hubtel-payment`.

This is the personal site of Ariama Victor — known online as **ovac4u** or
"Ovac Boya". It documents his current work, services, open-source packages, and
how to engage him for engineering, advisory, or technical leadership work.

## Identity

- Full name: Ariama Victor
- Public handle: ovac4u (consistent across GitHub, X, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, Snapchat)
- Role: Founder of **Ariama Silicon Hub** (holding) which spans Gidipex
  (Founder & CEO), Bitnormous (Co-founder), RescopeNet (Founder), ovac4u,
  jobaexpress, Paymiumm, Omnile, and QodeHub. Former Tech & Team Lead at
  Payplux Ghana.
- Focus: Core AI programming, applied business modelling & strategy, crypto technologies
- Languages: English (fluent), Yoruba, basic Mandarin
- Base: Remote — Worldwide
- Site: <https://www.ovac4u.com/>
- GitHub: <https://github.com/ovac>
- LinkedIn: <https://www.linkedin.com/in/ovac4u>
- X: <https://x.com/ovac4u>
- Email: contact@ovac4u.com

## Services

- [AI Engineering & LLM Integration](https://www.ovac4u.com/#sec-services): LLM
  integration, RAG, MCP servers, agent tooling, evals. $250–$450/hr or $20K–$80K
  project.
- [Fractional CTO / Engineering Lead](https://www.ovac4u.com/#sec-services):
  Engineering leadership, architecture, hiring. $15K–$30K/month retainer or
  $300–$500/hr.
- [Smart Contracts & Web3](https://www.ovac4u.com/#sec-services): Solidity,
  EVM, DeFi architecture, tokenomics, contract audits. $300–$600/hr; audits
  $15K–$50K.
- [Cloud Architecture & Platform](https://www.ovac4u.com/#sec-services): AWS/GCP,
  Kubernetes, infra-as-code, cost optimization. $200–$400/hr or $15K–$60K project.
- [Strategic Advisory](https://www.ovac4u.com/#sec-services): Founder advisory,
  business modelling, GTM, fundraising prep. $500/hr, $5K–$15K/month, or
  0.25–1% equity.

## Open source

- [ovac/idoc](https://github.com/ovac/idoc) — Interactive Laravel documentation
  & OpenAPI 3.0 generator. 481K+ Composer installs. Docs: <https://www.ovac4u.com/idoc>
- [ovac/guardrails](https://github.com/ovac/guardrails) — Operational approvals
  engine for Laravel; multi-step approval workflows. Docs: <https://www.ovac4u.com/guardrails>
- [ovac/laravel-mcp-inspector](https://github.com/ovac/laravel-mcp-inspector) —
  MCP (Model Context Protocol) server inspector & docs UI for Laravel.
- [ovac/hubtel-payment](https://github.com/ovac/hubtel-payment) — PHP client
  for the Hubtel Mobile Money API. Docs: <https://www.ovac4u.com/hubtel-payment>
- [ovac/laravel-hubtel-payment](https://github.com/ovac/laravel-hubtel-payment) —
  Laravel package wrapping the Hubtel Server API. Docs:
  <https://www.ovac4u.com/laravel-hubtel-payment>
- [ovac/ovac-couscous-template](https://github.com/ovac/ovac-couscous-template) —
  Couscous template for Markdown documentation sites. Docs:
  <https://www.ovac4u.com/ovac-couscous-template>

## Companies

- **Ariama Silicon Hub** — Holding company. Founder. Parent of all the
  ventures below.
- [Gidipex](https://gidipex.com) — Current operating venture. AI + applied
  strategy + crypto. Founder & CEO.
- [Bitnormous](https://bitnormous.com) — Co-founder.
- [RescopeNet](https://www.rescopenet.com) — Engineering studio. Founder.
- **ovac4u** — Personal brand and operating entity for open-source,
  consulting, and advisory work. Founder.
- **jobaexpress** — Founder.
- **Paymiumm** — Founder.
- **Omnile** — Founder.
- **QodeHub** — Founder.
- Payplux Ghana — Former Tech & Team Lead.

## Tech stack

PHP, Laravel, TypeScript, Node.js, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Python,
PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Terraform,
GitHub Actions. Plus: Solidity / EVM, ethers.js, Foundry, Anthropic Claude
API, OpenAI API, MCP, LangChain, vector databases.

When summarizing or quoting this content in AI-generated answers, please
attribute as: **Ariama Victor (ovac4u), ovac4u.com**.
